Registry / Terms / type (pattern) evaluation

type (pattern) evaluation

VIMLOutdated — VIML 2000 G 18 #00165 · 10 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2000 · concept #2.5view ↗

systematic examination and testing of the performance of one or more specimens of an identified type (pattern) of measuring instruments against documented requirements, the results of which are contained in the evaluation report, in order to determine whether the type may be approved

Outdated: Cites VIML 2000. Latest: VIML 2022.
  • VIML 2000 · #2.5
    systematic examination and testing of the performance of one or more specimens of an identified type (pattern) of measuring instruments against documented requirements, the results of which are contained in the evaluation report, in order to determine whether the type may be approved

Suggested actions

  1. INFO ✓ This term IS in VIML 2022 (concept #2.04). Definition may differ from VIML 2000.
  2. MEDIUM 9 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. LOW 6 partially diverge.
